type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Source testing for particulate matter was conducted on the Reverberatory Furnaces from April 2 to April 4, 2019.  The total quantity of Aluminum (fume or dust only) released is estimated based on total particulate emissions from the Furnace Flue and Baghouses, and the percent metal in baghouse dust.  Annual emissions of particulate matter increased due to source testing results.  Therefore, annual releases of Aluminum (fume or dust only) also increased.
Decrease due to a decrease in the annual operating hours of the Shredder Baghouse.  The Shredder Baghouse ran for 50% of 2019.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

Annual emissions of particulate matter increased due to source testing results.  Therefore, annual releases of Copper (and its compounds) also increased.
